scripts.install:all: npm --prefix common install && npm --prefix publish install && npm --prefix vs-code-extension install
scripts.build: npm --prefix publish run build && npm --prefix vs-code-extension run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix common test && npm --prefix publish test && npm --prefix vs-code-extension test
scripts.lint: npm --prefix common run lint && npm --prefix publish run lint && npm --prefix vs-code-extension run lint
